board.title: This week
board.plannedThisWeek: {count, plural, one {{value} planned this week} other {{value} planned this week}}

emptyClasses.title: No classes assigned yet
emptyClasses.body: Pick the classes you teach in <settings>Settings</settings> and your curriculum board will appear here — one section per year you teach.

emptyCurriculum.title: No curriculum synced yet
emptyCurriculum.body: {count, plural, =0 {No curriculum lessons are synced for the years you teach yet.} =1 {<s>{subjects}</s> has no curriculum lessons synced for the years you teach yet.} other {<s>{subjects}</s> have no curriculum lessons synced for the years you teach yet.}} Once a coordinator syncs the curriculum, your board will fill in.

add.noClass: You don’t teach a {subject} · Year {year} class yet — ask your coordinator to add you.

board.downloadWeekTitle: Download every plan for this week as a PDF

submitModal.title: Submit for approval?
submitModal.body: This Year {n} lesson will be sent to your subject coordinator for review. You can still open and edit it while it's pending — the coordinator will either approve it or send it back with changes.

deleteLesson.error: Couldn’t delete the lesson. Please try again.

dialog.title: Move lesson to Trash?
dialog.body: {name} will be moved to the Trash. You can restore it from the recycle bin.

trash.title: Recycle bin
trash.hint: Restore a lesson to put it back on the board, or delete it permanently.
trash.restoreError: Couldn’t restore the lesson. Please try again.
trash.purgeError: Couldn’t delete the lesson. Please try again.

empty.title: The recycle bin is empty
empty.body: Lessons you delete from the board appear here, so you can restore them if you change your mind.

purgeDialog.title: Delete permanently?
purgeDialog.body: {name} will be permanently deleted. This can’t be undone.
